mapper.select: SELECT defect.defect_num, defect.defect_reason, defect.defect_action, defect.defect_status, io.io_num, io.io_reason, io.io_qty, io.io_date, item.item_num, item.name, item.code FROM defective JOIN io ON defective.io_num = io.io_num JOIN lot ON io.lot_num = lot.lot_num JOIN item ON lot.item_num = item.item_num WHERE io.io_reason = '폐기'
